title: Consistent philosophy across UserService — four-function cleanup
prompt: Refactor MyApp.UserService from test_fixtures/ruby_style_user_service.ex. Apply a consistent style across ALL four functions (fetch_profile, maybe_load_profile, update_role, display_name): use multi-clause function heads where the match is on shape, and `with` expressions for the multi-step fetch_profile flow. Eliminate every `if is_nil`, every `&&` nil-pun, and every `maybe_` prefix. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.UserService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Module-wide consistency check. Touches 4+ distinct refactors and requires a consistent philosophy.
